title: fix(pagination): off-by-one in last-page slice
body: Pagination slice was dropping the last element. The test exposes this but the fix is incomplete.
author: seed-author
diff:
diff --git a/src/pagination.py b/src/pagination.py
--- a/src/pagination.py
+++ b/src/pagination.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 def paginate(items, page, per_page):
     start = (page - 1) * per_page
-    end = page * per_page - 1
+    end = page * per_page
     return items[start:end]
